Li Gui жќЋзЏЄ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Gui (жќЋзЏЄ). Advised Liu Cong to hand over power to Liu Qi, rebuked Cai Mao for his actions. Li Gui is a fictional character. Li Gui was affiliated with Liu Biao.
